title: n8n-io/n8n
summary: n8n：具备原生AI能力的低代码工作流自动化平台
raw_content: n8n-io/n8n: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations. (stars: 189,626 | lang: TypeScript | topics: ai, apis, automation, cli, data-flow, development, integration-framework, integrations, ipaas, low-code, low-code-platform, mcp, mcp-client, mcp-server, n8n, no-code, self-hosted, typescript, workflow, workflow-automation)

key_points: Fair-code许可，支持自托管或云部署，集成400+服务
结合可视化构建与自定义代码，原生支持AI能力
支持MCP协议（客户端/服务器），扩展AI代理工作流
analysis.impact: n8n作为高星开源工作流平台，其原生AI集成和MCP支持将显著降低AI工作流构建门槛，推动自动化与AI的深度融合。
